recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: EverAfter
recommendations.overview: Danielle, a vibrant young woman, was forced into servitude after the death of her father when she was a young girl. Danielle's stepmother, Rodmilla, is a heartless woman who forces Danielle to do the cooking and cleaning, while she tries to marry off

recommendations.title: Just Say Yes
recommendations.overview: Incurable romantic Lotte finds her life upended when her plans for a picture-perfect wedding unravel -- just as her self-absorbed sister gets engaged.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: XOXO
recommendations.overview: XOXO follows six strangers whose lives collide in one frenetic, dream-chasing, hopelessly romantic night.

recommendations.title: The Drama
recommendations.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

recommendations.title: Us Again
recommendations.overview: In a vibrant city pulsating with rhythm and movement, an elderly man and his young-at-heart wife rekindle their youthful passion for life and each other on one magical night.

recommendations.title: Falling for Christmas
recommendations.overview: An engaged, spoiled hotel heiress finds herself in the care of a handsome, blue-collar lodge owner and his precocious daughter after getting amnesia in a skiing accident.

recommendations.title: Prem Ratan Dhan Payo
recommendations.overview: While recovering from an assassination attempt four days before his coronation, a stern prince is replaced by a romantic lookalike.
